mapper.sql: id, order_no, store_no, goods_no, goods_amount, goods_price, total_price, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
insert into order_detail
id,
order_no,
store_no,
goods_no,
goods_amount,
goods_price,
total_price,
create_time,
update_time,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{storeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{goodsNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{goodsAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{goodsPrice,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{totalPrice,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update order_detail
order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
store_no = #{storeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goods_no = #{goodsNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goods_amount = #{goodsAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
goods_price = #{goodsPrice,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
total_price = #{totalPrice,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update order_detail set order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, store_no = #{storeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goods_no = #{goodsNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goods_amount = #{goodsAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, goods_price = #{goodsPrice,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, total_price = #{totalPrice,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select od.id, od.order_no, od.store_no, od.goods_no, od.goods_amount, od.goods_price, od.total_price, od.create_time, od.update_time, g.id gid, g.goods_no ggoods_no, g.goods_name, g.category_id, g.goods_introduce, g.goods_content, g.goods_state,g.goods_picture, g.goods_market_price, g.create_time gcreate_time, g.update_time gupdate_time,s.id sid, s.area_id, s.store_no sstore_no, s.store_name, s.store_address, s.max_longitude, s.max_latitude, s.min_longitude, s.min_latitude, s.longitude, s.latitude, s.store_introduce, s.start_time, s.close_time, s.store_status, s.create_time screate_time, s.update_time supdate_time from order_detail od inner join goods g on od.goods_no=g.goods_no inner join store s on od.store_no=s.store_no where od.order_no=#{orderNo} order by od.create_time desc
